mandf_onlineg: Over the past 30 days, how many days have you engaged in online gambling?
mandf_casinog: Over the past 30 days, how many days have you gambled at a casino?

bbgs_1: During the past 12 months, have you become restless, irritable or anxious when trying to stop/cut down on gambling?
bbgs_2: During the past 12 months, have you tried to keep your family or friends from knowing how much you gambled?
bbgs_3: During the past 12 months did you have such financial trouble as a result of your gambling that you had to get help with living expenses from family, friends or welfare?
gsas_1: If you had unwanted urges to gamble during the past WEEK, on average, how strong were your urges?
gsas_2: During the past WEEK, how many times did you experience urges to gamble?
gsas_3: During the past WEEK, how many hours (add up hours) were you preoccupied with your urges to gamble?
gsas_4: During the past WEEK, how much were you able to control your urges?
gsas_5: During the past WEEK, how often did thoughts about gambling and placing bets come up?
gsas_6: During the past WEEK, approximately how many hours (add up hours) did you spend thinking about gambling and thinking about placing bets?
gsas_7: During the past WEEK, how much were you able to control your thoughts of gambling?
gsas_8: During the past WEEK, approximately how much total time did you spend gambling or on gambling related activities?
gsas_9: During the past WEEK, on average, how much anticipatory tension and/or excitement did you have shortly before you engaged in gambling? If you did not actually gamble, please estimate how much tension and/or excitement you believe you would have experienced, if you had gambled.
gsas_10: During the past WEEK, on average, how much excitement and pleasure did you feel when you won on your bet. If you did not actually win at gambling, please estimate how much excitement and pleasure you would have experienced, if you had won.
gsas_11: During the past WEEK how much emotional distress (mental pain or anguish, shame, guilt, embarrassment) has your gambling caused you?
gsas_12: During the past WEEK how much personal trouble (relationship, financial, legal, job, medical or health) has your gambling caused you?

norc_1: Have there ever been periods lasting two weeks or longer when you spent a lot of time thinking about your gambling experiences or planning out future gambling ventures or bets?
norc_2: Have there ever been periods lasting two weeks or longer when you spent a lot of time thinking about ways of getting money to gamble with?
norc_3: Have there ever been periods when you needed to gamble with increasing amounts of money or with larger bets than before in order to get the same feeling of excitement?
norc_4: Have you ever tried to stop, cut down, or control your gambling?
norc_5: On one or more of the times when you tried to stop, cut down, or control your gambling, were you restless or irritable?
norc_6: Have you ever tried but not succeeded in stopping, cutting down, or controlling your gambling?
norc_7: If yes, has this happened three or more times?
norc_8: Have you ever gambled as a way to escape from personal problems?
norc_9: Have you ever gambled to relieve uncomfortable feelings such as guilt, anxiety, helplessness,or depression?
norc_10: Has there ever been a period when, if you lost money gambling one day, you would return another day to get even?
norc_11: Have you ever lied to family members, friends, or others about how much you gamble or how much money you lost on gambling?
norc_12: Has this happened three or more times?
norc_13: Have you ever written a bad check or taken something that didn't belong to you from family members or anyone else in order to pay for your gambling?
norc_14: Has your gambling ever caused serious or repeated problems in your relationships with any of your family members or friends?
norc_15: ANSWER N/A IF YOU ARE NOT IN SCHOOL: Has your gambling caused you any problems in school, such as missing classes or days of school or your grades dropping?
norc_16: Has your gambling ever caused you to lose a job, have trouble with your job, or miss out on an important job or career opportunity?
norc_17: Have you ever needed to ask family members or anyone else to loan you money or otherwise bail you out of a desperate money situation that was largely caused by your gambling?
fevs_1: How worried are you about having enough money to pay for things?

fevs_4: How confident are you in making big financial decisions?

fevs_6: How often do your monthly expenses exceed your regular monthly income?
fevs_7: How often do you wish you had someone to talk to about financial decisions, transactions, or plans?
fevs_8: How often do you feel anxious about your financial decisions and/or transactions?
fevs_9: How often do you feel downhearted or blue about your financial situation or decisions?
